  "findings": [
    "Drywall joints are not staggered, creating continuous vertical or horizontal seams."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove and reinstall the drywall panels to ensure all butt joints are staggered by at least one stud space (typically 16 inches or 24 inches) or as specified by GA-216."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to GA-216 and standard drywall installation practices, joints on opposite sides of a partition or adjacent panels on the same face must be staggered to prevent cracking, maintain structural integrity, and ensure fire-resistance ratings where applicable.",
  "references": [
    "GA-216 Section 4.7",
    "IRC Section R702.3.1"
  ]
}
